title: Nipah virus: Surveillance - Canada.ca
content:
## Nipah virus: Surveillance
- Symptoms and treatment

- Number of cases of Nipah virus in Canada
- How Canada monitors Nipah virus

## Number of cases of Nipah virus in Canada
No cases of Nipah virus infection have been reported in Canada.

## How Canada monitors Nipah virus
All suspected or probable cases of Nipah virus must be reported right away. Reports can be made through the 24-hour emergency line at 1-866-262-8433.
